summary.zh-CN: 主职业配置不再保留旧的一键安装路径，改为提供外部管理指引、CLI 可用性检测与启用控制，让 profession 接入方式更清楚。
summary.en: Primary profession setup no longer keeps the older one-click install path and now provides external-management guidance, CLI availability checks, and enablement controls so prof...

summary.zh-CN: 成就系统改为根据真实产品行为触发，而不再依赖旧的倒计时和重置时钟流程。
summary.en: Achievements now trigger from real product behavior instead of the older countdown and reset-clock flow.

summary.zh-CN: 新增多存档管理能力，后端补充存档目录、激活接口和存档上下文，前端设置页也加入存档目录面板，便于在不同工作存档之间切换。
summary.en: Added multi-save management with backend save catalog and activation endpoints, save context metadata, and a matching save catalog panel in settings.

summary.zh-CN: Hero 现已支持自定义头像上传、存储与缩略图展示，相关管理界面和多语言文案也一并完善。
summary.en: Heroes now support custom avatar upload, storage, and thumbnail rendering, with matching updates across management surfaces and translations.

summary.zh-CN: Hero Battle Report 新增 HagiPower 趋势图表，并补充了对应报表内容的多语言文案。
summary.en: Added HagiPower directional charts to hero battle reports, with matching translation updates for the new report content.

summary.zh-CN: 新增品牌自定义能力，支持上传与管理品牌 Logo，并在设置中扩展相关定制入口，便于为不同部署环境统一界面标识。
summary.en: Added brand customization support with logo upload and management, plus expanded settings entry points for deployment-specific branding.

summary.zh-CN: 新增并发策略与 Turbo Engine 相关能力，覆盖后端会话管理、前端工具函数和提案流程，便于更稳定地处理并行执行场景。
summary.en: Added concurrency policy and Turbo Engine support across backend session management, frontend utilities, and proposal flows to better handle parallel execution scenarios.

summary.zh-CN: 新增每日与全局成就追踪，覆盖设置页、状态栏与战报，并支持成就快照的实时更新。
summary.en: Added daily and global achievement tracking across settings, status surfaces, and battle reports, with real-time achievement snapshot updates.

summary.zh-CN: 新增会话标题自动优化能力，聊天标题会更清晰，同时补充了默认标题跟踪。
summary.en: Added automatic conversation title optimization, so chats can get clearer titles with better default title tracking.

summary.zh-CN: 统一了 Code Server 的主要打开入口，从会话、提案等场景进入编辑环境会更一致。
summary.en: Unified the main Code Server entry flow so opening the editor from sessions, proposals, and related entry points feels more consistent.

summary.zh-CN: 增强了 Code Server / VS Code 相关入口和集成能力，让打开代码与进入开发环境更顺畅。
summary.en: Improved Code Server / VS Code entry points and integration to make opening code and entering the dev environment smoother.

summary.zh-CN: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
summary.en: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.

summary.zh-CN: 补充了配置、接口和多语言等配套支持，提升整体功能可用性。
summary.en: Added supporting work across configuration, APIs, and localization to improve overall feature readiness.

summary.zh-CN: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。
summary.en: Expanded HagiPower / Hero features and UI to improve progression, presentation, and interaction experience.

summary.zh-CN: 完善了 HagiPower / Hero 相关功能与界面，提升角色进度、展示和操作体验。

summary.en: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.

summary.zh-CN: 扩展了插件、提醒和通知相关能力，提升日常使用中的辅助体验。
summary.en: Expanded plugin, reminder, and notification capabilities for a smoother day-to-day experience.

summary.zh-CN: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。

summary.zh-CN: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
summary.en: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.

summary.en: This version mainly focuses on stability and detail refinements rather than clear new product features.
